name: claude-cli-bridge
description: Bridge from Claude Desktop to Claude CLI (Claude Code). Delegate coding tasks, run prompts, and manage sessions through your local Claude CLI installation.
long_description:
This extension connects Claude Desktop (chat, code, and cowork modes) to your locally installed Claude CLI. It lets Claude delegate real software engineering tasks — reading/writing files, running commands, editing code — to Claude Code running on your machine.

Tools included:
* **claude_prompt** — Send a prompt and get a response
* **claude_code_task** — Delegate full coding tasks with file/terminal access
* **claude_structured** — Get structured JSON output
* **claude_continue** — Continue the most recent CLI conversation
* **claude_resume** — Resume a specific session by ID
* **claude_status** — Check CLI version and health

tools.name: claude_prompt
tools.description: Send a prompt to Claude CLI in print mode and get the response. For questions, analysis, and content generation.

tools.name: claude_code_task
tools.description: Delegate a real coding task to Claude CLI with full tool access (read/write files, run commands, etc). The CLI runs autonomously in the given directory.

tools.name: claude_structured
tools.description: Get structured JSON output from Claude CLI. Useful for machine-readable responses.

tools.name: claude_continue
tools.description: Continue the most recent Claude CLI conversation in a directory. For multi-step tasks.

tools.name: claude_resume
tools.description: Resume a specific Claude CLI session by ID.

tools.name: claude_status
tools.description: Check Claude CLI version and health.
